site.title: Bags & Totes | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom bags, totes, backpacks, laptop bags & cooler bags for businesses, teams & events across Barrie, Muskoka & the GTA.

hero.title: Bags & Totes
hero.imageAlt: Custom branded bags, totes, and backpacks

centreText.title: Carry Your Brand Further
centreText.description: Put your logo into circulation with bags people actually keep & reuse. Built for real-life use, from work & events to tradeshows, travel & giveaways.

features.title: Everyday Bags That Stay In Circulation
features.description:
Bags only work if people use them. We focus on styles that stay in rotation & get seen everywhere, with practical options that work well for conferences, retail, gifts, events, teams & everyday use.

  • Durable tote bags for conferences, trade shows, retail & gifts
  • Drawstring backpacks for events, teams & quick giveaways
  • Laptop bags & work totes
  • Utility & organizer bags

Pair them with notebooks, pens & drinkware to complete your welcome or event kits.

features.title: Backpacks & Travel-Ready Gear
features.description:
Backpacks & travel bags are so popular, and offer long-term visibility when customized with your logo or company name. Perfect for work, travel & daily use, they are useful pieces people are more likely to keep.

  • Branded backpacks for office, school & team use
  • Travel & commuter bags
  • Tech-friendly backpacks with compartments
  • Drawstring bags & gym bags

Our drawstring backpacks are super popular with kids & teens too. Visit our showroom at 178 Tiffin St. in Barrie to view our selection.

features.title: Cooler Bags & More
features.description:
Customized cooler bags & specialty carriers are high-retention items, popular for job sites, road trips, beach days, cottaging, BBQs & weekends away.

  • Insulated cooler bags
  • Lunch bags & meal carriers
  • Event & tournament bags
  • Utility bags for crews & teams

These make practical, thoughtful gifts & giveaways that don't get left behind.
